objective: Record the final evidence-backed E2E proof for the always-on SoM HITL relay epic.
scope_boundary: Validate the governance-owned HITL queue against approval, request-changes, ambiguous response, stale session, duplicate/replay, expired notification, audit replay, and privacy fail-closed paths.
Tie final evidence to the merged child slices in hldpro-governance, ai-integration-services, and local-ai-machine.
Create final validation and Stage 6 closeout evidence for parent epic #296 and final gate #303.
Update the #296 backlog mirror only after local E2E evidence exists.
out_of_scope: Editing ai-integration-services or local-ai-machine after their child slices have merged.
Enabling live SMS, Slack, or terminal injection adapters.
Treating raw operator message text as a local CLI instruction.
Closing any future channel-specific follow-up outside this issue.
research_summary: #299 delivered HITL relay packet contracts, #302 delivered the security policy, #300 delivered validators, #301 delivered the queue-first governance prototype, ai-integration-services#1144 delivered sandbox transport evidence, local-ai-machine#462 delivered MCP/orchestrator normalization, and local-ai-machine#463 delivered the local CLI session adapter. #303 is the final proof and closeout slice for #296.

sprints.name: Final E2E Matrix
sprints.goal: Prove all #303 acceptance paths with executable local evidence.
tasks: Add a final E2E test that preserves request, notification, response, session, model, validator, instruction, resume, and audit identity across the queue.
Run the final E2E test with the existing queue, schema, validator, and Local CI gates.
Record exact command outcomes and child-slice merge evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: approval produces a bounded session instruction for the matching session.
Final AC: request-changes routes feedback without approval semantics.
Final AC: ambiguous response requests clarification and emits no instruction.
Final AC: stale session creates a resume packet instead of injecting into a session.
Final AC: duplicate, replayed, expired, and external-channel PII replies fail closed.
Final AC: audit replay reconstructs the request, notification, response, decision, instruction, and session identity chain.

sprints.name: Stage 6 Closeout
sprints.goal: Close the parent epic only after final E2E proof exists and CI is green.
tasks: Run structured plan, execution scope, diff hygiene, queue, packet, and Local CI validation.
Update backlog mirror and issue comments with residual risk decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: closeout cites the exact proof artifact and validation commands.
Final AC: live SMS/Slack and terminal push adapters remain disabled/follow-up until separately planned.
Final AC: GitHub PR checks pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Executable proof of #303 acceptance paths and child-slice evidence continuity.
specialist_reviews.summary: Final E2E test and validation artifact are the primary proof package for #303.

alternate_model_review.summary: Same-family review is allowed by the issue #303 exception and is recorded in the closeout package.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #303 may add final E2E tests, validation evidence, closeout evidence, structured plan/PDCAR/scope artifacts, and #296 backlog status mirror updates in hldpro-governance only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run local final E2E validation, PR checks, merge, then close #303 and #296 with evidence.

material_deviation_rules: If any child slice is not merged, stop and repair that child issue before final closeout.
If final E2E cannot prove the identity chain, keep #296 open and create a gap issue.
If live SMS/Slack or terminal push is required, create follow-up issues instead of expanding this final evidence slice.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules, no HITL, e2e testing as final AC
